subject: Mozi Minute: Risk Reversal Gold
body:
Words I like: Opportunity only looks like opportunity looking backwards. Today it looks like risk.

Mozi Minute: Risk Reversal Gold

Everyone thinks risk reversal means guarantees.

Wrong.

There are other ways:

Examples:
- Recruiters who replace bad hires at no fee.
- Certification companies who re-certify new employees if you lose certified ones.
- Marketing agencies who extend campaigns free if results don't hit target.
- Web designers who offer free emergency fixes for 6 months.
- Contractors who warranty their work plus cover damages from other trades.
- Accountants who pay penalties if they make tax errors.

You're not just selling your service - you're eliminating their biggest fear AFTER buying it.

Big realization for me:
People will pay to avoid pain longer than they'll pay for pleasure.

Risk reversal doesn't just help you sell - it helps you keep customers.

Because the fear of losing protection is often stronger than the desire for the original benefit.

Eliminate their downside
- Alex
